annotationSummary.plainEnglishMeaning: This report explains selected variant annotation rows and their reference sources. Consequence terms describe predicted transcript or protein effects and should not be treated as medical conclusions.
annotationSummary.professionalReview: A qualified professional can interpret variant annotations together with validated clinical evidence, family history, phenotype, laboratory context, and current clinical guidelines.
